summary: A suggested progression path for developing Claude Code competence, from first use through organizational strategy.

learningStages.title: Getting Started
learningStages.summary: Install Claude Code, learn the basics, and develop the habit of reviewing output carefully.
suggestedActivities: Install Claude Code and complete a simple coding task.
Practice reading diffs before accepting them.
Try writing the same prompt three different ways and compare results.
Read the official Claude Code documentation end-to-end.

learningStages.title: Structured Practice
learningStages.summary: Develop structured prompting habits and systematic verification practices.
suggestedActivities: Implement a multi-file feature using decomposed prompts.
Create a personal checklist for reviewing AI-generated code.
Practice providing explicit context and constraints in every prompt.
Start a CLAUDE.md file for your most active project.

learningStages.title: Environment Mastery
learningStages.summary: Configure project environments that make Claude Code effective by default.
suggestedActivities: Design and implement CLAUDE.md files for three different projects.
Configure hooks for automated linting and formatting.
Set up at least one MCP server for external tool access.
Experiment with directory-level CLAUDE.md for monorepo structures.

learningStages.title: Workflow Design
learningStages.summary: Design multi-agent workflows and integrate AI coding into development pipelines.
suggestedActivities: Run parallel Claude Code agents on independent tasks.
Integrate Claude Code into a CI/CD pipeline.
Design a workflow for automated PR review.
Practice headless/non-interactive mode for scripted operations.

learningStages.title: Organizational Strategy
learningStages.summary: Develop governance frameworks and AI coding strategy at organizational scale.
suggestedActivities: Draft an AI coding governance policy for your team.
Design an audit trail system for AI-generated code changes.
Create a training plan for onboarding team members to AI coding tools.
Evaluate new AI coding tools with a structured risk/benefit framework.

futureExpansions.title: Prompt Engineering for Code
futureExpansions.summary: Deep-dive into prompt engineering techniques specific to code generation tasks.

futureExpansions.title: Multi-Model Strategies
futureExpansions.summary: Using different AI models for different coding tasks based on their strengths.

futureExpansions.title: Team AI Coding Patterns
futureExpansions.summary: Patterns for teams collaborating with AI coding tools at scale.

futureExpansions.title: AI Code Safety Deep Dive
futureExpansions.summary: Advanced safety analysis for AI-generated code in production systems.
